title: coleus melleri
intro: Coleus melleri, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a plant species in the mint family, native to Sri Lanka, and is used in traditional medicine for its aromatic and medicinal properties. It is valued for its essential oils, which possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Coleus melleri include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Coleus melleri include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
